category_title: Preschoolers with expressive language difficulties who use adults as living auxiliary tools
scenario_title: Experience sharing about an emotional event using imaginary tools
minimal_context: Maliha is playing outdoors with a plastic tub of mulch and a sand pit while trying to share a story about her grandmother.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What are you making in the plastic tub with the mulch?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Indicating the tub) My fire. Look... (Runs towards the plastic tub again)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your fire? Do you want some more sand from the sand pit?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Approaching the sand pit) Grandma... A fireworks...

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Grandma fell down on the bed and... (Opens her mouth but does not say any word, appearing to struggle to find appropriate words)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: What are you making in the plastic tub with the mulch?

STUDENT: (Indicating the tub) My fire. Look... (Runs towards the plastic tub again)

TUTOR: Your fire? Do you want some more sand from the sand pit?

STUDENT: (Approaching the sand pit) Grandma... A fireworks...

TUTOR: And after that?

STUDENT: Grandma fell down on the bed and... (Opens her mouth but does not say any word, appearing to struggle to find appropriate words)

task.content: trying to share a story about her grandmother's funeral ritual

context.materials: plastic tub with mulch and bark, sand pit

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: struggling to find the words to describe her grandmother passing away
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: did not say any word though she opened her mouth
related_quotes: Grandma fell down on the bed and …

behavior_patterns.condition: struggle to find appropriate words to express herself
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: stuttered and had to repeat words and sounds during her communications
